custom.background: rgb(255, 255, 255) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
custom.transition: color 0.2s linear, background-color 0.2s linear, border 0.2s linear, box-shadow 0.2s linear

tw: inline-block static font-normal leading-normal text-center whitespace-nowrap border visible cursor-pointer m-0 pt-0 pr-3.5 pb-0 pl-3.5 overflow-visible
